message:
fix(conformance): eliminate double-write race in packet005 evidence pack and add adversarial workflow scenario

The evidence pack generator previously wrote parity_report.json twice:
once with a placeholder "sha256:pending-p2c005-drift-hash" drift hash,
then again after computing the real hash. This created a window where
the on-disk parity report contained a stale placeholder, which could
corrupt bundle digests if any concurrent process (e.g. CI artifact
upload) read the file between the two writes.

Restructure run() to compute the compatibility drift hash *before* the
first parity_report.json write by:

1. Introducing compatibility_drift_source_files() — a new function that
   derives the drift-hash input set from the full source bundle by
   filtering out parity_report.json itself (which cannot be part of its
   own hash input). A hard error is raised if the parity report is
   unexpectedly absent from the bundle list, catching manifest drift.

2. Extracting compute_artifact_digests() from the existing
   compute_compatibility_drift_hash(), so artifact SHA256 collection can
   be called independently after the single parity report write. This
   removes duplicated fs::read + sha256 logic.

3. Moving ensure_files_exist() to run *after* the parity report write
   for the full source bundle (which now includes the just-written
   report), while the drift hash computation only needs the subset.

4. Adding workflow_scenario_corpus.json to packet_bundle_source_files()
   so the new adversarial scenario is included in bundle hashing.

Fixture changes (workflow_scenario_corpus.json):

Add "ufunc_packet_override_gufunc_edge_guardrails" adversarial scenario
covering override-wire fail-closed behavior and gufunc-like signature
contract edge cases in strict/hardened modes. The scenario includes five
steps: three ufunc_input cases (missing rhs_shape, missing rhs_values,
axis out-of-bounds on 5D tensor) and two runtime_policy_wire cases
(unknown mode and unknown class, both expecting fail_closed). Two P1
gaps are tracked for future override-precedence fixture lanes and
gufunc signature-shape contract extensions.

Tests:

Add three unit tests validating the new helper functions:
- packet_bundle_source_files includes both parity_report.json and
  workflow_scenario_corpus.json
- compatibility_drift_source_files correctly excludes parity_report
- compatibility_drift_source_files errors when parity_report is missing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -517,6 +517,85 @@
       }
     ]
   },
+  {
+    "id": "ufunc_packet_override_gufunc_edge_guardrails",
+    "category": "adversarial",
+    "description": "Packet FNP-P2C-005 adversarial workflow covering override-wire fail-closed behavior and gufunc-like signature contract edges in strict/hardened modes.",
+    "seed": 5603,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-005/contract_table.md",
+      "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/ufunc_adversarial_cases.json",
+      "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/runtime_policy_adversarial_cases.json",
+      "scripts/e2e/run_workflow_scenario_gate.sh"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "ufunc_override_gufunc_edge_guardrails",
+    "strict": {
+      "expected_status": "fail_closed"
+    },
+    "hardened": {
+      "expected_status": "fail_closed"
+    },
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "id": "step_signature_missing_rhs_shape",
+        "kind": "ufunc_input",
+        "case_id": "mul_missing_rhs_shape",
+        "expect_error_contains": "rhs_shape"
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "step_signature_missing_rhs_values",
+        "kind": "ufunc_input",
+        "case_id": "mul_missing_rhs_values_2x1x3_by_1x3x1",
+        "expect_error_contains": "rhs_values"
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "step_high_rank_axis_guard_rejected",
+        "kind": "ufunc_input",
+        "case_id": "sum_axis_out_of_bounds_5d",
+        "expect_error_contains": "axis"
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "step_override_wire_unknown_mode_fail_closed",
+        "kind": "runtime_policy_wire",
+        "case_id": "wire_unknown_mode_fail_closed",
+        "expected_action_strict": "fail_closed",
+        "expected_action_hardened": "fail_closed"
+      },
+      {
+        "id": "step_override_wire_unknown_class_fail_closed",
+        "kind": "runtime_policy_wire",
+        "case_id": "wire_unknown_class_fail_closed",
+        "expected_action_strict": "fail_closed",
+        "expected_action_hardened": "fail_closed"
+      }
+    ],
+    "links": {
+      "differential_fixture_ids": [
+        "mul_missing_rhs_shape",
+        "mul_missing_rhs_values_2x1x3_by_1x3x1",
+        "sum_axis_out_of_bounds_5d"
+      ],
+      "e2e_script_paths": [
+        "scripts/e2e/run_workflow_scenario_gate.sh",
+        "scripts/e2e/run_security_policy_gate.sh"
+      ]
+    },
+    "gaps": [
+      {
+        "bead_id": "bd-23m.16.10",
+        "owner": "bd-23m.16.10",
+        "priority": "p1",
+        "description": "Add explicit override-precedence fixture lanes once override-bridge semantics are wired into packet-005 differential harness inputs."
+      },
+      {
+        "bead_id": "bd-23m.16.11",
+        "owner": "bd-23m.16.11",
+        "priority": "p1",
+        "description": "Extend this scenario family with true gufunc signature-shape contracts after packet-005 gufunc parser support lands."
+      }
+    ]
+  },
   {
     "id": "stride_tricks_packet_replay",
     "category": "high_frequency",
